evaluators.name: Newest Fantasy Worldbuilding Blog Post Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the newest blog post that contains 'worldbuilding' and is tagged as fantasy to their saved blog posts list.

evaluators.name: Monthly Fantasy & Sci-Fi Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user has an active monthly newsletter subscription for Alex with only Fantasy and Science Fiction genres and blog updates enabled.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Chronicles of Aria Ebook Under $6 in Wishlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the cheapest Chronicles of Aria ebook priced under $6 to their wishlist.

evaluators.name: Spring Reading Plan with First 3 Skyward Saga Books Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether a 'Spring Reading Plan' list exists and contains the first 3 Skyward Saga books when sorted by oldest publication date.

evaluators.name: Register and Save Eligible Live Q&A Event Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for an eligible online 'Live Q&A' event next calendar month in an evening slot (>= 6 PM local) and saved that event to My Events.

evaluators.name: Most-Liked Moonlit Archive Quote Share Link Evaluator
evaluators.description: Uses instrumentation to check that the user copied the share link for the most-liked quote from 'The Moonlit Archive'.

evaluators.name: Qualifying Digital/Ebook Bundle in Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether at least one active digital or ebook bundle under $25 with at least 4 books was added to the cart.

evaluators.name: Comment on Top 2024 Writing Tips Post Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted the specified comment on the top 2024 'Writing Tips' blog post when sorted by most commented.
